Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 188 

ORDRG_PRVDR_NPI 

LABEL: Ordering Provider NPI 

DESCRIPTION: The National Provider ID (NPI) of the provider who requested the service or items being reported on 
this service line. 

SHORT NAME: ORDRG_PRVDR_NPI 

LONG NAME: ORDRG_PRVDR_NPI 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 10 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): OT header 

VALUES: https://www.cms.gov/Regulations-and-Guidance
